title: Page Not Loading Due to GoJS Error
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want pages to load without GoJS errors blocking rendering, so that I can access my data without interruption.
description:
## Bug
A GoJS error prevented the page from loading when accessing the Cardiff view in production. The page displayed a loading spinner indefinitely. A possible cache issue from production was suspected.

## Resolution
The issue could not be reproduced by the developer and was likely resolved by a prior fix or cache invalidation. Marked as done.
acceptance_criteria: Pages load without GoJS errors blocking rendering
Cardiff view renders correctly in production
ux_changes: Fixed page loading issue caused by GoJS error.
implementation_notes: Could not be reproduced — likely a transient cache issue or resolved by a prior GoJS license fix.
comment_summary: Developer could not reproduce the issue in incognito mode. After months, confirmed it was no longer occurring, likely fixed by a prior change.
